posts.author: berklabs (BERK Labs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When dismissing or taking action up on a notification, that status should synchronize across devices. I find it very inconvenient that I need to delete/dismiss notifications on both the mobile app and also on the desktop web, when those two should synchronize. The current approach is double the work to manage my tasks.

What are you trying to achieve

Reduce my notification management time and cognitive burden by half.
